scripts.build: npm run build -w @pentest-copilot/contracts && npm run build -w @pentest-copilot/skills && npm run build -w @pentest-copilot/terminal && npm run build -w @pentest-copilot/core && npm run build -w @pentest-copilot/cli
scripts.test: npm run test -w @pentest-copilot/contracts && npm run test -w @pentest-copilot/terminal && npm run test -w @pentest-copilot/core
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @pentest-copilot/contracts && npm run lint -w @pentest-copilot/terminal && npm run lint -w @pentest-copilot/skills && npm run lint -w @pentest-copilot/core && npm run lint -w @pentest-copilot/cli
